entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum, the crop studied for resistance to dry root rot.

entities.name: DRY ROOT ROT
entities.description: A root disease in chickpea caused by Rhizoctonia bataticola.

entities.name: RHIZOCTONIA BATATICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen responsible for causing dry root rot.

entities.name: DRY ROOT ROT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The genetic ability of chickpea to resist dry root rot.

entities.name: BLOTTING-PAPER TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A laboratory technique used to assess the reaction of plants to dry root rot.

entities.name: MONOGENIC INHERITANCE
entities.description: A pattern of inheritance where a trait is controlled by a single gene.

entities.name: DOMINANCE
entities.description: The genetic state where the resistance allele masks the susceptibility allele.
